data.title: Here's How Much $100 Invested In Energy Fuels 5 Years Ago Would Be Worth Today
data.description:
Energy Fuels (AMEX:UUUU) has outperformed the market over the past 5 years by 18.16% on an annualized basis producing an average annual return of 29.79%. Currently, Energy Fuels has a market capitalization of $5.33 billion.

Buying $100 In UUUU: If an investor had bought $100 of UUUU stock 5 years ago, it would be worth $353.92 today based on a price of $21.48 for UUUU at the time of writing.

Finally -- what's the point of all this? The key insight to take from this article is to note how much of a difference compounded returns can make in your cash growth over a period of time.
